tasks.instruction: Dopasuj nazwy instrumentów muzycznych (1–6) do ich opisów (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: This large keyboard instrument produces sound when felt-covered hammers strike metal strings inside a wooden case. It has 88 keys.
This string instrument is held under the chin and played with a bow. It is the smallest and highest-pitched in its family.
This brass instrument has a wide bell and three valves. It is often used to play fanfares and is central to jazz music.
This woodwind instrument is a long metal tube with keys. The player blows across a hole near one end to produce sound.
This percussion instrument consists of a set of drums and cymbals played by one person using sticks and foot pedals.
This plucked string instrument has a round or figure-of-eight shaped body with a long neck. It usually has six strings.
This large string instrument is played sitting down, held between the knees. It has a deep, rich sound, lower than a violin.
This wind instrument is a long curved tube that produces a deep, low sound. It is the largest instrument in the brass family.
